concerns.text: FR-001 (Synthetic data generation) and US-1 require persistence of generated data with metadata for reproducibility (Constitution Principle VI). Task T014 ('Implement data persistence to data/synthetic/') is marked as unchecked [ ]. Without this task, the system cannot satisfy the reproducibility requirement or the ground truth validation loop.

FR-004 and US-3 require a simulation loop of at least 10,000 iterations. Task T027 ('Implement simulation loop orchestration') is marked as unchecked [ ]. This is the core engine required to execute the simulation volume mandated by the spec. Its absence means the project cannot meet FR-004.

FR-010 requires fitting mixed-effects models for both synthetic and real-world data. Tasks T031a (synthetic) and T031b (real-world) are marked as unchecked [ ]. Without these, the specific statistical analysis required by FR-010 and SC-007 is missing.

FR-008 and US-4 require orchestrating the ingestion of multiple real-world datasets. Task T034b ('Orchestrate Real-World Dataset Ingestion') is marked as unchecked [ ]. While T034a creates the config, the actual loop to process the datasets is missing, leaving FR-008 unimplemented.

FR-006 and US-3 require generating visualizations and summary reports. Task T032 ('Generate summary report comparing deviations') is marked as unchecked [ ]. Additionally, T040 (Documentation/quickstart) and T044 (Quickstart validation) are unchecked, leaving the project without a verified reproducibility path as required by Constitution Principle I.

Task T001b is marked with a comment '<!-- FAILED: unspecified -->' but is also marked as checked [X]. This is a stale/contradictory state. If the task was failed, it should be unchecked; if it is complete, the failure comment should be removed to avoid confusion.

Task T026 is marked with a comment '<!-- FAILED: unspecified -->' but is also marked as checked [X]. Similar to T001b, this indicates a stale state where a failed task is marked as complete, creating ambiguity in the task list.
